all.en: Incident Report — Lost Luggage on Pacific Airways Flight PA218
all.zh: 事件報告 — 太平洋航空 PA218 航班行李遺失

all.en: Filed by: Daniel Park, Marketing Director, Global Brands Division
all.zh: 申報人：全球品牌部行銷總監 Daniel Park

all.en: Date of incident: April 3, arrival at Frankfurt International Airport
all.zh: 事件日期：4 月 3 日，抵達法蘭克福國際機場

all.en: My checked suitcase failed to arrive on the conveyor belt at baggage claim.
all.zh: 我託運的行李箱未於行李轉盤上出現。

all.en: I waited an additional ninety minutes before reporting the loss.
all.zh: 我等候九十分鐘後才申報遺失。

all.en: A Property Irregularity Report was filed at counter B12 at 08:47.
all.zh: 已於 08:47 在 B12 櫃台填具行李異常報告。

all.en: The reference number assigned is FRAPA47218 for tracking purposes.
all.zh: 案件追蹤編號為 FRAPA47218。

all.en: The suitcase is a hard-shell black Samsonite measuring 75 centimeters.
all.zh: 該行李箱為 75 公分黑色 Samsonite 硬殼。

all.en: It contains business attire, presentation materials, and personal items.
all.zh: 內裝商務服裝、簡報資料及個人物品。

all.en: Estimated total value of contents is USD 3,850 based on receipts.
all.zh: 依收據估計內容物總價值為 3,850 美元。

all.en: Letter of Claim to Pacific Airways Customer Relations:
all.zh: 致太平洋航空客服部之求償信函：

all.en: Dear Sir or Madam, I am writing to formally lodge a compensation claim.
all.zh: 敬啟者，本人來信正式提出賠償申請。

all.en: Under the Montreal Convention, your airline bears liability for the loss.
all.zh: 依蒙特婁公約，貴航空公司就此項遺失應負賠償責任。

all.en: The maximum compensation limit is approximately 1,288 Special Drawing Rights.
all.zh: 最高賠償上限約為 1,288 特別提款權單位。

all.en: Equivalent to roughly USD 1,700 at current exchange rates.
all.zh: 依現行匯率約合 1,700 美元。

all.en: I am also claiming USD 420 in emergency purchases made in Frankfurt.
all.zh: 另申請於法蘭克福緊急購買物品之 420 美元。

all.en: These included two business shirts, one suit, and basic toiletries.
all.zh: 包含兩件商務襯衫、一套西裝及基本盥洗用品。

all.en: All emergency purchase receipts are attached as Exhibit A.
all.zh: 所有緊急採購收據已附於附件 A。

all.en: The original packing list is provided as Exhibit B for reference.
all.zh: 原行李物品清單請見附件 B。

all.en: Please process this claim within the statutory twenty-one day period.
all.zh: 請於法定二十一日內處理本案。

all.en: Yours faithfully, Daniel Park
all.zh: 此致 敬意，Daniel Park

all.en: Internal email to Finance: I need to file a corporate expense report.
all.zh: 致財務部內部信件：我需要申報公司費用報告。

all.en: Emergency purchases totaled USD 420 in unbudgeted expenses.
all.zh: 緊急採購共計 420 美元為預算外支出。

all.en: Per Section 7.1 of the travel policy, these are reimbursable.
all.zh: 依差旅政策第 7.1 條，此類費用可申請報銷。

all.en: Receipts have been scanned and uploaded to the expense portal.
all.zh: 收據已掃描並上傳至報帳系統。

all.en: Once the airline pays compensation, the company will be repaid accordingly.
all.zh: 待航空公司賠付後，公司可獲相應退回。

all.en: Please advance the funds so the claim does not delay my cash flow.
all.zh: 請先預支該款項，避免影響本人個人現金流。

all.en: Finance reply: We have approved emergency reimbursement under exception code 401.
all.zh: 財務回覆：已依例外代碼 401 核准緊急報銷。

all.en: Funds will be deposited into your designated account within three working days.
all.zh: 款項將於三個工作天內存入指定帳戶。

all.en: Please assign airline compensation directly to the company once received.
all.zh: 航空公司賠付到位後，請將款項直接轉入公司帳戶。

all.en: Provide us with the airline claim reference for our records.
all.zh: 請提供航空公司案件編號供我方建檔。

all.en: Five days later — update from Pacific Airways Customer Relations:
all.zh: 五日後 — 太平洋航空客服更新：

all.en: Dear Mr. Park, we regret to inform you the bag has not been located.
all.zh: Park 先生您好，遺憾通知您行李仍未尋獲。

all.en: Per our tracing protocol, items missing beyond 21 days are deemed lost.
all.zh: 依本公司追蹤程序，逾 21 日未尋獲視為遺失。

all.en: Your claim has been escalated to the Settlement Department for review.
all.zh: 您的案件已呈報理賠部門審查。

all.en: Please complete the attached Liability Statement Form within seven days.
all.zh: 請於七日內填妥所附責任聲明書。

all.en: An itemized list with replacement cost estimates must be provided.
all.zh: 須提供逐項物品及其重置成本估價。

all.en: Depreciation may apply to garments and electronics over six months old.
all.zh: 使用逾六個月之衣物及電子產品適用折舊。

all.en: Standard depreciation rate is fifteen percent per year of use.
all.zh: 標準折舊率為每年使用百分之十五。

all.en: Daniel's reply with itemized list attached as required:
all.zh: Daniel 依規定附上逐項清單回覆：

all.en: Please find the completed Liability Statement Form and item list.
all.zh: 請查收已填妥之責任聲明書與物品清單。

all.en: Total claimed value after depreciation is USD 2,940.
all.zh: 扣除折舊後申請總額為 2,940 美元。

all.en: Combined with emergency purchases the grand total is USD 3,360.
all.zh: 加上緊急採購，總金額為 3,360 美元。

all.en: I understand this exceeds the convention liability cap of USD 1,700.
all.zh: 本人知悉此金額已超過公約責任上限 1,700 美元。

all.en: I have therefore filed a parallel claim under my corporate travel insurance.
all.zh: 故本人已並行向公司差旅保險提出申請。

all.en: The insurance policy covers the gap between airline payout and actual loss.
all.zh: 該保單可補航空公司賠付與實際損失之間的缺口。

all.en: Settlement outcome two weeks later:
all.zh: 兩週後理賠結果：

all.en: Pacific Airways approved the maximum convention payout of USD 1,700.
all.zh: 太平洋航空核准最高公約賠付 1,700 美元。

all.en: Corporate travel insurance approved an additional USD 1,660 in settlement.
all.zh: 公司差旅保險另核准補償 1,660 美元。

all.en: Combined recovery covers 100% of documented losses and emergency costs.
all.zh: 兩項合計可補償全部有單據之損失及緊急開銷。

all.en: Daniel transferred USD 420 directly to the company expense account.
all.zh: Daniel 已將 420 美元直接匯入公司報帳帳戶。

all.en: Finance closed the advance loan record under file ADV-2026-0411.
all.zh: 財務以檔號 ADV-2026-0411 結清預支借款紀錄。

all.en: Lessons learned: keep receipts in carry-on luggage whenever possible.
all.zh: 經驗教訓：收據儘可能放於隨身行李內。

all.en: Photograph the contents of checked bags before each trip.
all.zh: 每次出差前先拍攝託運行李內容物。

all.en: Case closed; report filed under archive code LL-2026-008.
all.zh: 案件結案；報告歸檔於檔案編碼 LL-2026-008。
